ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spatial_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "subset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subset of spatial data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which this data point belongs */,
  "coordinate_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the spatial point */,
  "coordinate_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the spatial point */,
  "coordinate_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the spatial point */,
  "displacement_x" REAL /* X-axis displacement from the original coordinates */,
  "displacement_y" REAL /* Y-axis displacement from the original coordinates */,
  "displacement_z" REAL /* Z-axis displacement from the original coordinates */,
  "rotation_x" REAL /* Rotation around the X-axis */,
  "rotation_y" REAL /* Rotation around the Y-axis */,
  "rotation_z" REAL /* Rotation around the Z-axis */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value associated with the spatial transformation */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value associated with the spatial transformation */,
  "status_flag" INTEGER /* Status flag indicating the validity or state of the data point */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was created or updated */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground survey) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_subset_id FOREIGN KEY ("subset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which this dataset belongs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location or region covered by the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., satellite, ground survey) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License or usage terms of the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
